NOT_APPLICABLE: Tier-3 step adds NO new below-port mutable production source; WITHHOLD/retain logic already mutation-gated at 01-03 (answer_for NxDomain arm + NameIndex healthy-gate seam) and 01-04 (FrontendAddrAllocator release only-on-deletion). Mirrors 02-02 RED_UNIT SKIP precedent.

FAIL: NXDOMAIN-01 PASS (isolated) + NXDOMAIN-03 PASS (isolated); NXDOMAIN-02 FAIL (isolated) — surfaces a production WITHHOLD-on-stop gap: after POST /v1/jobs/{id}/stop converges the alloc to Terminated, the service_backends healthy row is NOT dropped, so the responder keeps answering the stale F indefinitely (getent -> [10.98.0.1] code 0 forever; never NXDOMAIN). The WITHHOLD-on-zero-healthy seam is not driven by the production stop path. Fixing requires changing READ-ONLY production (backend_discovery_bridge re-eval on alloc-Terminated / action-shim re-enqueue) = OUT OF BOUNDS, design-gap BLOCKER. NXDOMAIN-02 recovery leg separately #249-blocked (ignored). Secondary: the 3 active tests interfere when run in parallel (shared :53 responder + FrontendAddrAllocator + identical server name) — pass individually, collide together. Sibling 02-02 hit-path test still GREEN. COMMIT withheld pending user decision.

NOT_APPLICABLE: S-DBN-PINGPONG is a single-example golden Tier-3 bidirectional walkthrough (criterion 1: no PBT at Tier 3) over already-gated 01/02 production logic; criterion 6 forbids any new below-port mutable production source. No unit test to author — mirrors the 02-02 / 03-01 RED_UNIT SKIP rationale.

NOT_APPLICABLE: no new below-port mutable production source — the bidirectional dial-by-name datapath (responder serve, re-keyed MtlsResolve, FrontendAddrAllocator, egress leg-B interception) is already mutation-gated production from steps 01/02; this step authors a Tier-3 acceptance test only. Mirrors the 02-02 / 03-01 RED_UNIT skip rationale.
